opportunities.description: Scheduler triggers remediation if fewer than minCurrentMonth opps in current month. EnsureCurrentMonthOpportunities restores to minTotal=10 (buffer above threshold). Min 2 Omega opps required.

events.description: Minimum number of Events in the next N days

activity.description: All open current-quarter opps must have recent activity for PM Agent Activity badges to appear. requireAllCurrentQuarterForAgent=true ensures EnsureOppActivity runs whenever any opp is missing activity.

staleDays.description: Key objects should have been modified within this many days
